description: bl-20fc used 'doctor' as the example UNWIRED diffless verb in two op-plan tests and left a stale §16-doctor comment. Doctor is being removed (bl-77a7 spec burn, bl-a38e code). Retarget the examples to 'install' (the only unwired diffless verb after doctor) and scrub the comment. Files: tests/dispatch.rs (module doc + an_unwired_diffless_verb_reports_its_op_plan), src/lib_tests.rs (a_skeleton_verb_reports_its_op_plan), src/reads/tree.rs (module-doc cycle comment -> point at the readiness/blocker walk, not doctor/§16). NOT delivery_tests.rs (protocol ops list — coupled to delivery.rs, owned by bl-a38e). Keep 100% coverage; the install example still exercises the lib::run 'other => Op::plan' arm.
title: Scrub bl-20fc's incidental doctor refs (dispatch/lib_tests examples + tree comment)
